# GoethePrep C1

> iOS app for preparing the Goethe-Zertifikat C1 German exam.

## About
GoethePrep C1 helps candidates prepare for the Goethe-Zertifikat C1 exam with 7 complete practice exams, real audio, AI writing correction, progress tracking, and daily practice drills.

## Features
- 7 complete practice exams in official format
- Real audio with native German speakers
- AI-powered writing correction for Schreiben section
- Progress tracking by section and task
- Daily quick practice drills
- Section-specific practice (Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen)

## Links
- Website: https://c1.goetheprep.com/
- Main site: https://goetheprep.com/
- Blog: https://c1.goetheprep.com/blog/
